transcription.text: In every Rex store, every department has every name-ring color TV, every microwave oven, and every audio and video component at savings you can only find at Rex's Everything on Sale Sale. Now, Rex has gone beyond their everyday guaranteed low prices and slash prices in every department. Incredible savings on everything. Everything is on sale now at Rex. Rex's Everything on Sale Sale. Going on now. You always say, let's have Rex!
